none.justification: Gives the exact GT count of 70, uses a whole-repo grep scoped to .c files, lists only src/ matches, and explicitly notes deps/, modules/, and tests/ add none. That addresses the main scope ambiguity called out by the rubric.

ccodegraph.justification: Gives the exact count of 70 and supports it with multiple checks: graph includers filtered to .c, SQL COUNT/DISTINCT COUNT, and a whole-repo grep. Although the deps/tests/modules point is not spelled out in those exact names, the whole-repo verification and matching count satisfy the full-credit intent.

codegraph.justification: Gives the exact count of 70, says all matches are under src/, and cross-checks a full-repo grep against CodeGraph imports with matching results. This directly addresses both correctness and the src vs whole-repo ambiguity.

cbm.justification: Gives the exact count of 70, states all results are under src/, and notes each file has one live include with no duplicates or comments. The whole-repo grep plus per-file validation meet the GT scoring requirements.
